changes.value:
## What

Implement the BLOCKING virtual tag strategy. A task is BLOCKING when at least one other task depends on it AND this task is NOT yet in the terminal column.

**Files to modify:**
- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/virtual_tags.rs` ÔÇö add `BlockingStrategy` struct implementing `VirtualTagStrategy`:
  - `slug()` Ôćĺ `\"BLOCKING\"`
  - `color()` Ôćĺ `\"d73a4a\"` (red ÔÇö signals urgent/critical path)
  - `description()` Ôćĺ `\"Other tasks depend on this one\"`
  - `matches()` Ôćĺ reuse logic from `task_blocks()` ÔÇö true if blocks list is non-empty AND task is not in terminal column
- Register in `default_virtual_tag_registry()`

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `BlockingStrategy` implements `VirtualTagStrategy`
- [ ] Task depended on by others AND not complete Ôćĺ has BLOCKING tag
- [ ] Task depended on by others BUT already complete Ôćĺ does NOT have BLOCKING tag
- [ ] Task not depended on Ôćĺ does NOT have BLOCKING tag
- [ ] Registered in default registry

## Tests
- [ ] Unit test: task with dependents not in terminal matches BLOCKING
- [ ] Unit test: completed blocker task does not match BLOCKING
- [ ] Unit test: task with no dependents does not match BLOCKING
- [ ] `cargo nextest run -p swissarmyhammer-kanban` passes

## Workflow
- Use `/tdd` ÔÇö write failing tests first, then implement to make them pass.

#virtual-tags
VT-7: Strategy ÔÇö BLOCKING virtual tag
